metric_value: Dedicated single-purpose NAS appliance: no user applications on data server; multiprotocol NFS/CIFS/HTTP

notes: First factor in Aberdeen's four-part IS budget cycle problem framework

notes: Second factor: managed centrally via NAS vs. dispersed storage silos
